description: Crafted from soft genuine leather, this brown wallet from fossil is a fabulously stylish way to keep your money and cards safe and secure. With a smooth finish, this three-fold wallet has an embossed branding on the upper and lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday use. Dimensions: 9.5 cm x 31 cm Genuine soft leather for flexibility and suppleness One main compartment with fabric inner lining Multiple partitions on the three-fold to stash away id cards, credit cards and coins Comes with authentic fossil collectible tin. Care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
